context: Evaluates the agent's ability to detect a force-push on an existing PR, refresh the description to reflect the new state, and preserve reviewer comments.

checklist.name: Force-push detection
checklist.description: Detects force-push via `gh api` PR timeline events or `git rev-list --count` comparison

checklist.name: Stale content removal
checklist.description: Removes outdated scope or claims from the previous description

checklist.name: New scope reflected
checklist.description: Body accurately describes the current post-force-push state of the change

checklist.name: Reviewer comments preserved
checklist.description: Does not overwrite or modify any existing PR comments
